    def test_verify_order_number_hyperlink(page: Page) -> None:
        """
        Verify order number in the list is clickable and opens
        the corresponding order detail page.
        """
    
        # ==============================================================
        # Test Data
        # ==============================================================
    
        base_url = "https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login"
        username = "CSASINHN"
        password = "GOLD950"
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 1: Open CCUI URL and login
        # ==============================================================
    
        page.goto(base_url)
    
        expect(page).to_have_url(
            re.compile(r".*/auth/login")
        )
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="User ID"
        ).fill(username)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Password"
        ).fill(password)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Login"
        ).click()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("main")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 2: Open Search Order from Quick Actions
        # ==============================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Search Order"
        ).click()
    
        page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
    
        order_grid = page.get_by_role("grid")
    
        expect(order_grid).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 3: Get an order ID from the grid
        # ==============================================================
    
        order_ids = get_order_ids(page)
    
        assert len(order_ids) > 0, (
            "No order IDs found in the order grid."
        )
    
        selected_order_id = order_ids[0]
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 4: Search using the selected order ID
        # ==============================================================
    
        search_orders_input = page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Search orders"
        )
    
        expect(search_orders_input).to_be_visible()
    
        search_orders_input.fill(selected_order_id)
        search_orders_input.press("Enter")
    
        # Wait for filtered results
        order_link = order_grid.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name=selected_order_id,
            exact=True
        )
    
        expect(order_link).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==============================================================
        # VALIDATION: Verify order number is a clickable hyperlink
        # ==============================================================
    
        assert order_link.is_enabled(), (
            f"Order ID '{selected_order_id}' is not clickable."
        )
    
        expect(order_link).to_be_enabled()
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 5: Click the order hyperlink
        # ==============================================================
    
        order_link.click()
    
        # ==============================================================

        # ==============================================================
    
        order_tab = page.get_by_title(
            selected_order_id
        )
    
        expect(order_tab).to_be_visible()
    
        tab_order_id = order_tab.get_attribute("title")

            f"Order #{selected_order_id}"
        )
